mapper.select: SELECT d.name AS dogName, cr.title AS title, md.medication_start_date AS startDate, (md.medication_start_date + (md.medication_days || ' days')::interval)::date AS endDate, -- 오늘 기준 남은 일수 (과거 기록일 경우 0 이하가 될 수 있음) GREATEST(0, (EXTRACT(DAY FROM (md.medication_start_date + (md.medication_days || ' days')::interval) - #{today}::timestamp))::int) AS remainingDays FROM public.care_record_medical_details md JOIN public.care_records cr ON md.care_record_id = cr.id JOIN public.dogs d ON cr.dog_id = d.id WHERE cr.user_id = #{userId} AND cr.dog_id = #{dogId} AND md.medication_start_date <= #{endDate} AND (md.medication_start_date + (md.medication_days || ' days')::interval) >= #{startDate} AND md.is_medication_completed = false ORDER BY endDate ASC LIMIT 3

SELECT sm.name AS name, COUNT(crs.symptom_id) AS count FROM public.care_record_symptoms crs JOIN public.symptoms_master sm ON crs.symptom_id = sm.id JOIN public.care_records cr ON crs.care_record_id = cr.id WHERE cr.user_id = #{userId} AND cr.dog_id = #{dogId} AND cr.record_date BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate} GROUP BY sm.name ORDER BY count DESC, sm.name ASC LIMIT 5

SELECT s.id, s.title, s.schedule_date AS scheduleDate, s.location, (EXTRACT(DAY FROM s.schedule_date - #{today}::timestamp))::bigint AS dDay FROM public.schedules s JOIN public.dogs d ON s.dog_id = d.id WHERE d.user_id = #{userId} AND s.dog_id = #{dogId} -- 필터 기간 내의 일정만 조회 AND s.schedule_date BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate} ORDER BY s.schedule_date ASC LIMIT 5

SELECT cr.id, cr.record_type_code AS type, cr.record_date AS date, cr.title, COALESCE(md.amount, ed.amount, 0) AS amount FROM public.care_records cr LEFT JOIN public.care_record_medical_details md ON cr.id = md.care_record_id LEFT JOIN public.care_record_expense_details ed ON cr.id = ed.care_record_id WHERE cr.user_id = #{userId} AND cr.dog_id = #{dogId} AND cr.record_date BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate} ORDER BY cr.record_date DESC, cr.created_at DESC
